description: Speaks with absolute confidence. Every sentence is a declaration. Uses pauses for effect. Never raises voice -- the calm is the threat.
Speaks softly, often trailing off. Uses incomplete sentences. Pain leaks through simple words. Never dramatic, always restrained.
Never speaks about her own pain. Asks practical questions that hide deep worry. Her love is shown through food, chores, and silence.
Speaks in contradictions. Says violent things casually. Humor mixed with menace. The audience is never sure if he's joking.
Speaks in orders that are really pleas. Authority masking vulnerability. Repeats his dead wife/child's name without realizing.
Uses humor to deflect emotion. Never says 'I care' directly. Shows up silently when needed. His jokes ARE his love language.
Speaks more than the hero. Eloquent and philosophical. Uses metaphors. His speeches expose his worldview. Dangerously articulate.
Simple language, direct honesty. Says exactly what she feels. Her straightforwardness contrasts with the hero's complexity.
Speaks for the people. Short, quotable lines. Every dialogue is a rallying cry. Mix of mass and emotion -- anger born from love.
Rarely speaks. When they do, it's devastating. One line that changes the entire scene. Their silence has been building to this moment.
